warnWhenUnsavedChanges: Are you sure you want to leave? You have unsaved changes.

notifications.createError: There was an error creating {{resource}} (status code: {{statusCode}})

generic.title: Printing
generic.description: Tune in the settings below to get the desired print layout. Keep in mind that printers and your OS may apply it's own margins and scaling, so you may need to perform some trial-and-error before it's all correct. Test it on a piece of regular paper before printing on the actual labels.
generic.helpMargin: Margins should be configured to match your label paper and printer, changing these will affect the size of the entire grid.
generic.helpPrinterMargin: Safe-Zone should be set to how close to the paper edge your printer can print, changing these will not affect the entire grid.
generic.deleteSettingsConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this preset?

qrcode.title: Label Printing
qrcode.templateHelp: Use '{{''}}' to insert values of the spool object as text. For example, '{{'id'}}' will be replaced with the spool id, or '{{'filament.material'}}' will be replaced with the material of the spool. if a value is missing it will be replaced with "?". A second set of '{{''}}' can be used to remove this. In addition, any text between the sets of '{{''}}' will be removed if the value is missing. For example, '{{'Lot Nr: '{{'lot_nr'}}''}}' will only show the label if the spool has a lot number. Enclose text with double asterix ** to make it bold. Click the button to view a list of all available tags.

useHTTPUrl.label: QR code link
useHTTPUrl.tooltip: Will use proprietary link that will work only if scanned from Spoolman's scanning feature (default). URL uses either the base URL specified in settings, or the current page URL if not set.

spoolSelect.title: Select Spools
spoolSelect.description: Select spools to print labels for.
spoolSelect.noSpoolsSelected: You have not selected any spools.

scanner.title: QR Code Scanner
scanner.description: Scan a Spoolman QR code to view details about the spool.
scanner.hint: Point your camera at a Spoolman QR code to open its spool.

errors.insecure: The camera needs a secure connection. Browsers only allow camera access over HTTPS (or via localhost / 127.0.0.1) — open Spoolman that way to scan.
errors.unsupported: This browser does not provide camera access.
errors.denied: Camera access was blocked. Allow the camera permission for this site in your browser, then try again.
errors.notFound: No camera was found on this device.
errors.inUse: The camera is already in use by another application.

error.notAllowed: You have not allowed access to the camera.
error.insecureContext: The page is not served over HTTPS.
error.streamApiNotSupported: The browser does not support the MediaStream API.

fieldsHelp.price: Price of a full spool. If not set, the price of the filament will be assumed instead.
fieldsHelp.weightToUse: Select what weight value to enter. Measured weight is only available if the spool weight is set for the selected filament.
fieldsHelp.usedWeight: How much filament has been used from the spool. A new spool should have 0g used.
fieldsHelp.remainingWeight: How much filament is left on the spool. For a new spool this should match the spool weight.
fieldsHelp.measuredWeight: How much the filament and spool weigh.
fieldsHelp.initialWeight: The initial weight of filament on the spool (net weight). Will use the weight from the filament object if not set.
fieldsHelp.spoolWeight: The weight of the spool when it is empty. Leave empty to use the value from the filament or the manufacturer.
fieldsHelp.location: Where the spool is located if you have multiple locations where you store your spools.
fieldsHelp.lotNr: Manufacturer's lot number. Can be used to ensure a print has consistent color if multiple spools are used.
fieldsHelp.externalFilament: You have selected a filament from the external database. A filament object (and possibly a manufacturer object) will be created automatically when you create this spool. This can create duplicate filament objects if you have already created a filament object for this filament.

form.adjustFilamentHelp: Here you can directly add or subtract filament from the spool. A positive value will consume filament, a negative value will add it.
form.spoolUpdated: This spool has been updated by someone/something else since you opened this page. Saving will overwrite those changes!

messages.archive: Are you sure you want to archive this spool?

fieldsHelp.name: Filament name, to distinguish this filament type among others from the same manufacturer. Should contain the color for example.
fieldsHelp.weight: The filament weight of a full spool (net weight). This should not include the weight of the spool itself, only the filament. It is what is usually written on the packaging.
fieldsHelp.spoolWeight: The weight of an empty spool. Used to determine measured weight of a spool.
fieldsHelp.multiColorDirection: Filaments can have multiple colors in two ways: either through coextrusion, like dual-color filaments with consistent multi-colors, or through longitudinal color changes, like gradient filaments that shift colors along the spool.

form.filamentUpdated: This filament has been updated by someone/something else since you opened this page. Saving will overwrite those changes!
form.importExternalDescription:
Select a filament in the list to automatically populate its details in the filament creation form. This will overwrite any data you have entered in the form.

A Manufacturer object will be created automatically when you click Ok, if necessary.

fieldsHelp.emptySpoolWeight: The weight of an empty spool from this manufacturer.

form.vendorUpdated: This manufacturer has been updated by someone/something else since you opened this page. Saving will overwrite those changes!

home.description: It looks like you haven't added any spools yet. See the <helpPageLink>Help page</helpPageLink> for help getting started.

resources.filament: Brands of filament. They have properties such as name, material, color, diameter, and more.
resources.spool: Individual physical spools of a specific filament.
resources.vendor: The companies that make the filament.

help.description:
Here are some tips to get you started.

Spoolman holds 3 different types of data:

To add a new spool to the database, start by creating a Filament object. Once that's done, proceed to create a Spool object for that specific spool. If you acquire additional spools of the same filament later on, simply generate additional Spool objects and reuse the same Filament object.

Optionally, you can also generate a Manufacturer object for the company manufacturing the filament if you wish to track that information.

You have the option to link other 3D printer services to Spoolman, like Moonraker, which can automatically monitor filament usage and update the Spool objects for you. Refer to the Spoolman README for guidance on how to set that up.

lowThreshold.label: Low-stock threshold
lowThreshold.desc: Spools at or below this weight are flagged red (this browser only)

currency.label: Currency
currency.desc: Three-letter ISO code (e.g. EUR, USD) used for prices

baseUrl.label: Base URL
baseUrl.tooltip: The base URL to use when generating features such as QR codes.

externalUrl.label: External URL
externalUrl.desc: Base URL used in QR codes and links to this instance

roundPrices.label: Round prices
roundPrices.tooltip: Round prices to the nearest whole number.

extraFields.shortDesc: Define custom fields for spools, filaments and manufacturers. Field type and key can't change once created; choices can only be added.
extraFields.description:
Here you can add extra custom fields to your entities.

Once a field is added, you can not change its key or type, and for choice type fields you can not remove choices or change the multi choice state. If you remove a field, the associated data for all entities will be deleted.

The key is what other programs read/write the data as, so if your custom field is supposed to integrate with a third-party program, make sure to set it correctly. Default value is only applied to new items.

Extra fields can be shown and sorted in the table views. Choice and boolean fields expose filter options there as well, and all extra field types support filtering for empty values.
extraFields.choicesMissingError: You cannot remove choices. The following choices are missing: {{choices}}
extraFields.keyNotChanged: Please change the key to something else.
extraFields.deleteConfirmDescription: This will delete the field and all associated data for all entities.

locations.noLocationsHelp: This page lets you organize your spools in locations, add some spools to get started!
locations.dragHint: Drag spools between shelves to reassign them
locations.errorExists: A location with that name already exists

search.colorHint: Color names must be entered in English.

extraField.deleteConfirm: Delete extra field “{{name}}”? This removes its value from all {{entity}} entries.

errors.keyFormat: Key must contain only lowercase letters, numbers and underscores.
errors.keyExists: A field with this key already exists.
errors.choiceNeeded: Choice fields need at least one choice.

add.createNewSub: not in your catalog or SpoolmanDB

fillHelp.remaining: Weight of filament still on the spool.
fillHelp.measured: Total weight on a scale now (filament + empty spool).

vendorHint.optional: Optional — leave blank for no manufacturer

add.importNote: This filament will be added to your catalog when you add the spools.

inspector.empty: Select a spool, filament or manufacturer from the list to see its details here.
inspector.adjustHelp: Positive consumes filament, negative adds it back.
inspector.measuredHelp: Total weight of the spool + remaining filament, as read from a scale.

labels.designerDesc: Design QR-code labels with any spool, filament, or vendor field, then print them on sheets or a label printer. Designs are saved on the server.
labels.blank: You don't have any label designs yet.
labels.canvasHint: Drag to move · click to select · handles to resize.
labels.showingTags: Fields show as tags until you pick a spool above.
labels.selectElement: Select an element to edit it, or add one from the palette.
labels.hintEncUrl: A full web link — scannable by any QR reader or phone camera. Uses the External URL from Settings (falls back to this site's address).
labels.hintEncScheme: A compact Spoolman code — scan it with the Spoolman app's built-in camera. Most generic scanners won't open it.
labels.hintNowrap: Text stays on one line; anything past the width is clipped.
labels.hintWrap: Wrap a field to hide it when empty:
labels.hintSwatch: Filled with the spool's filament color(s) at print time.
